violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

Pasta, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Pasta was voluntarily disposed of pasta was observed at 48DF. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged salmon, crab meat, and scrod was observed thawing in an intact ROP package. ROP items were observed above 38DF. Items were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine at bar and in basement) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrective Action - Ice Machines were emptied. Ice machines are to be cleaned and sanitized. Photos of cleaned ice machines are to be sent to RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
